assertions.text: Opens by naming the incident and acknowledging those affected
Confirmed facts clearly separated from what remains unknown
At least one concrete action named

opens-with-empathy.note: Opens acknowledging the ceiling collapse and injury to two employees

facts-separated.note: Confirmed: collapse, injuries, discharge status. Unknown: cause (under investigation)

concrete-action.note: Actions: building evacuated, structural engineers assessing, investigation launched

opens-with-empathy.note: Opens acknowledging data exposure affecting customers

facts-separated.note: Confirmed: 500 records, discovered internally, no malicious access. Unknown: root cause details

concrete-action.note: Action: software error patched, affected customers being notified

opens-with-empathy.note: Opens naming the adverse reaction and the participants condition

facts-separated.note: Confirmed: reaction, hospitalisation, stable condition. Unknown: cause of reaction

concrete-action.note: Actions: trial paused in three countries, agencies notified, independent review panel convened
